item.title: 👍Sheri Sawyer - Office of Financial Management
item.description: Sheri Sawyer signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Office of Financial Management.

item.title: ❓Micah Sherman - THE CANNABIS ALLIANCE
item.description: Micah Sherman signed up to testify Other.

item.title: 👎💵Ezra Eickmeyer - Producers NW
item.description: Ezra Eickmeyer signed up to testify Con. They are signed up to represent Producers NW. They are a registered lobbyist.

item.description: Caitlein Ryan signed up to testify Con. They are signed up to represent THE CANNABIS ALLIANCE.

item.title: 👍Paula Fillmore-Sardinas - FMSGS/WBBA
item.description: Paula Fillmore-Sardinas signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent FMSGS/WBBA.
